title: liatris cokeri
intro: Liatris cokeri, also known as Coker's Blazing Star or Coker's Gay Feather, is a flowering plant native to North America, belonging to the Liatris genus of the aster family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Liatris cokeri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of Liatris cokeri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
